content: React feature-based folder structure for mobile PWA: use src/features/<feature>/{components,hooks,services} for self-contained features, src/pages for route-level components (thin shells that compose feature components), src/shared/{components,hooks,utils} for cross-feature primitives. Colocate first, extract to shared when two features need the same thing. Each feature folder is a mini-application with its own state, queries, and mutations.
